name: Butterscotch Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add brown sugar, butter (or margarine), vanilla, and 2/3 cup milk to the flour mixture. Beat for 2 minutes at medium speed.
3. Stir in the remaining milk and eggs. Beat until well combined.
4. Pour batter into two greased and floured 8-inch cake pans.
5. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Remove cakes from the oven and let cool slightly in the pans.
7. Frost with butter frosting: Melt 1/4 cup butter (or margarine) over low heat, stirring constantly. Add the remaining ingredients to the melted butter, stirring until the frosting reaches a spreadable consistency.
8. Once cooled slightly, frost the cooled cakes.
